title: “None of the challenges sent by server (127.0.0.1) are supported”
body:
Hi everyone,
I have a V2 docker registry running behind an OAuth2 reverse proxy (specifically Zalando's skipper: https://github.com/zalando/skipper ). I tried using ` --dest-registry-token` but it fails - I think it expects the OAuth2 challenge to come from the registry. The specific error I am getting is the following:
`INFO[0000] None of the challenges sent by server (127.0.0.1) are supported, trying an unauthenticated request anyway`

How can I extend skopeo to support my use case - in case I am doing something wrong,

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@bikramguha can you please provide the necessary information, as I am OoO ?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Closing for now, do feel free to reopen with the requested logs.
